examples.text: الصِّحَّةُ تَاجٌ عَلَى رُؤُوسِ الْأَصِحَّاءِ لَا يَرَاهُ إِلَّا الْمَرْضَى.
examples.english: Health is a crown on the heads of the healthy, that only the ill can see.

examples.text: آلَةُ الْعَيشِ صِحَّةٌ وَشَبَابٌ / فَإِذَا وَلَّيَا عَنِ الْمَرءِ وَلَّى

senses.gloss: God bless you!, bless you! (exclamation said when someone sneezes)
Cheers!, To your health! (said in a toast, before drinking)
